contact.description: Get in touch with the DropAnyConvert team for support, bug reports, DMCA requests or partnership inquiries.

about.description: DropAnyConvert is a free, browser-based file conversion platform. Convert images, PDFs and developer formats with no file uploads, no accounts and no cost.

accessibility.description: DropAnyConvert's commitment to web accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) and how to report issues.

privacy-policy.description: How DropAnyConvert handles your data — and why we never see your files.

cookie-policy.description: What cookies DropAnyConvert uses and why.

disclaimer.description: Liability disclaimer for DropAnyConvert file conversion tools.

editorial-team.description: Learn about the DropAnyConvert editorial team, our review process, fact-checking standards and content update policy.

pricing.description: DropAnyConvert is free forever. Pro and API plans with advanced features are coming soon.

refund-policy.description: DropAnyConvert refund policy for paid subscriptions. Free tools have no charges.
